task_title: PC current truth head correction plus Astronomicon entry corridor save with Officio role and Russian owner output

language_and_encoding_policy.taskpack_internal_files: ENGLISH UTF8 NO_BOM only. Root taskpack files must contain no Cyrillic and no mojibake.
language_and_encoding_policy.canonical_repo_artifacts: ENGLISH UTF8 NO_BOM by default. Russian is allowed only for explicitly owner-facing reports or when Officio grants a localization exception receipt.
language_and_encoding_policy.owner_facing_russian_runtime_output: Owner-facing runtime output must switch to Russian only after OFFICIO_AGENTIS role entry and must be routed through OFFICIO authority.
language_and_encoding_policy.cyrillic_in_taskpack: FORBIDDEN in root internal taskpack files. Use English descriptions for Russian-output requirements.
language_and_encoding_policy.localization_exception: OFFICIO_AGENTIS may authorize Russian for final owner-facing summary; code, schemas, manifests, and machine receipts stay ENGLISH UTF8 NO_BOM unless a receipt says otherwise.

mandatory_role_entry.servitor_identity: The agent must enter Servitor role through OFFICIO_AGENTIS before mutation.
mandatory_role_entry.officio_gate: Read or inspect OFFICIO_AGENTIS role/contract files available in the repo and produce an Officio role-entry receipt before editing.
mandatory_role_entry.owner_language_after_gate: After the Officio meeting, owner-facing replies and final owner summary must be in Russian. Internal artifacts stay English.

patch_scope: Astronomicon taskpack form documentation or contract created by this task
Administratum current truth HEAD/card correction created by this task
Receipts proving validation, commit, push, and remote head closure
preserve_bootstrap_patches.encoding_requirement: All JSON/MD canonical artifacts created by this task must be UTF8 NO_BOM unless an existing contract requires otherwise.

not_proven_boundary: Do not claim full semantic truth of the whole Imperium.
Do not claim all organs are fully implemented.
Do not claim clean pass if Inquisition or Custodes receipts are absent.
Missing metrics must be UNKNOWN_WITH_REASON, not green.
